gist.headline: Daily README refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the repository's front page with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and updates.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot and Polly the bee working together to pin new pixelated polaroids (representing apps and news) onto a cozy wooden bulletin board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot pinning small pixelated polaroids to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
